data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Photo evidence for each checkpoint' but did not provide any evidence confirming that photo evidence is captured for all required checkpoints. The linked use case mentions checkpoints but lacks specific details or endpoints that demonstrate the existence of photo evidence for each checkpoint, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of photo evidence being captured for each checkpoint in the inspection process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
